inputs.label: Day 1 Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Basal body temperature reading for day 1

inputs.label: Day 2 Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Basal body temperature reading for day 2

inputs.label: Day 3 Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Basal body temperature reading for day 3

inputs.label: Baseline Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Average temperature from previous cycle or reference

inputs.label: Threshold Rise
inputs.businessContext: Temperature increase threshold to indicate shift

inputs.label: Days to Confirm
inputs.businessContext: Number of consecutive days above threshold to confirm shift

formulas.daysAboveThreshold: (day1Temp > baselineTemp + threshold ? 1 : 0) + (day2Temp > baselineTemp + threshold ? 1 : 0) + (day3Temp > baselineTemp + threshold ? 1 : 0)
formulas.temperatureShiftScore: ((day1Temp > baselineTemp + threshold ? 1 : 0) + (day2Temp > baselineTemp + threshold ? 1 : 0) + (day3Temp > baselineTemp + threshold ? 1 : 0)) >= daysToConfirm ? 1 : 0
